_template: Parent-skill hub graph-metadata.json scaffold. Replace every [bracketed] placeholder. This is the ONE discoverable identity for the whole parent skill — write exactly one of these, at the hub root, and zero inside any mode packet or shared/. The skill-graph compiler throws when skill_id != the containing folder name or when family is outside the allowed set, so both are load-bearing. See sk-doc/references/skill_creation.md section 10.
_family_note: family MUST equal one of: cli | mcp | sk-code | deep-loop | sk-util | system. Any other value makes the hub undiscoverable (compiler rejects it).

depends_on.context: [why this parent skill depends on the shared backend]

derived.causal_summary: [One paragraph: the parent skill routes a request to one of N modes by workflowMode through mode-registry.json over the [backend] backend; the three-tier discriminator keeps the modes distinct.]
